svg.title: CopilotForge Framework Architecture
svg.desc: A diagram showing the CopilotForge framework: user description flows through a planner agent into four output tracks: Skills, Agents, Memory, and Cookbook Recipes, all backed by a repo structure.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the user description get processed?')
g.text: "Build me a PR review agent with memory"

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the Planner agent do in CopilotForge?')
sendPrompt('What agent files does CopilotForge generate?')
sendPrompt('How does memory work in CopilotForge?')
sendPrompt('What cookbook recipes does CopilotForge produce?')
sendPrompt('What does the .copilot folder contain in CopilotForge?')
sendPrompt('What skills go in the .github folder?')
sendPrompt('What goes in the forge-memory folder?')
sendPrompt('What does the cookbook folder contain?')
sendPrompt('How does CopilotForge validate what it built?')
g.text: Files created · conflicts flagged · next steps
